titleStmt.title: SII 29.142: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 142. (A.R. No. B. 184 of 1962-63.) CHENNIPĀḌU, ALAMPUR TALUK, MAHABUBNAGAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (2) kept in front of Kēśavasvāmi temple.

The record belongs to the reign period of the Vijayanagara emperor Krishnadēvarāya. The inscription records a gift of the village Pūsalapāḍu alias Krishnarāyapura together with the income from various taxes by Dīkshitayya, the younger brother of Chandrasēkarayya and the son of Aṇṇāji-ayya to the god Chennakēśava of Chennipāḍu for the merit of the king and also of Dēmarasayya. Nothing is known about Dēmarasayya. Based on the suffix, it may be suggested that he might be a respectful elderly member of the family of Dīkshitayya. The gift village was situated in Alampura-sīme which was given to the donor as amaranāyakatana by the king.
The record is dated Śaka 1450 [wrong for 1451], Virōdhi, Vaiśākha Śu. 15 (on the occasion of lunar eclipse). It corresponds to 1529 A.D., April 23, [Friday]. The Lunar eclipse occured on that day.
The last two lines contain imprecatory portion in Telugu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: Published in Telangāṇa Śāsanamulu, Vol. II, Part-2, p. 149, No. 6.
div.p:
ṁ . śubhamastu . namasuṁ(stuṁ)gaśirasyuṁ(ścuṁ)bicaṁdra
cāmara cāravē . ttrailōkyanagarāraṁbhā(bha)mūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śaka
varuṣaṁgaḷu 1450 neya virōdhi saṁvatsarada vayiśākha
śu 15 lū sōmagrahaṇa puṇyakāladalu ceṁnipā
ḍa cennakēśvara dēvarige Aṁṇaji Ayanavara makaḷu caṁ
drasēkharayyana taṁmma dīkṣitayyanavaru namaskarisikoṭṭa bhū
dāna dharmaśāsana grāmadānapatrada kramaveṁteṁdare . śrīma
nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvī
ra kṛṣṇadēva mahārāyaru ratnasiṁhāsanarūḍharāgi
pṛthvī rājyaṁgeyutaṁyiralāgi namage Amaranāyaka
tanake pālisida naḍugaḍayastarada Alaṁpūri sīmege saluva
pūsalapāḍa grāmakke pratināmavāda kriṣṇarāyapurada grāma 1
nu ceṁnipāḍa ceṁnakēśvara dēvara Amṛtapaḍige sōmagrahaṇa puṁṇyakā
ladalu naṁmmasvāmi kṛṣṇadēvarāya mahārāyarige puṇyavāgiyu dē
marasayyanavarige puṇyavāgi pūsalapāḍa grāmakke pratināmavāda kṛṣṇarāya
puravaku sahiraṇyōdaka dānadhārāpūrvakavāgi dhāreyaneṟadu samarpiside
vu Ā pūsalapāḍu grāmakke pratināmavāda kṛṣṇarāyapurakke saluva catusīmeya do
ḷagaṇa nidhinikṣēpa jalapāṣāṇa Āgāmisidasādyaṁgaḷeṁba Aṣṭabōga sakaḷa suvaHereAkSiNi is ommitted.
rnādāyaṁ sakaḷadhānya Ādāya suṁka sūtra modalāgi ceṁnupāḍanu sarvamānya
vāgi dhāreyaneṟadu samarpisi koṭṭevāgi Ārobbaru yī dharmakke Anu
kūlavāgi naḍusūdu Eṁdu koṭa bhūdāna dharmmaśāsana grāmadā
na patra sānamāṁnya pūrva mariyāde . svadatta dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ
paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpaharēṇa svadatta niṣphalaṁ bhavēt [.]
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyō harēta vasuṁdarā(rāṁ) . ṣaṣṭirvaruṣa sa
hasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ dānapālanayōrmadhye dānā
tse(cchē)yōnupālanaṁ . dānātsvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ
padaṁ . svadattā ru(du) hitācaiva paradattā sahōdara . pitrudattāta
thāmātā tribhiḥ triṣuḥ (ṣu) vivarjayēt . yēkaiva bhagini lōke sarvvē
śāṁmye ṣā mēva bhūbhujāṁ . na bhōjyā nakaragrāhyā vipradattā vasu
ṁdharā . I dharmmānaku tappinarā tama tallitaṁḍ®lanu vāraṇāsi
lō caṁpina pāpānaṁ bōduru maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 29.142 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
